title: File Sync and Build Configuration
description: Configuration schema for mapping files and running lifecycle hooks.

debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds to wait before triggering an action.

createBackups.description: Determines if backups should be created before overwriting files.

logLevel.description: The verbosity level of the logs.

hooks.description: Lifecycle scripts to run at specific events.

onStartup.description: Hook executed when the application starts.

onUpdate.description: Hook executed when a file update is detected.

onShutdown.description: Hook executed when the application is closing.

mappings.description: List of file or directory mappings to sync/copy.

source.description: The absolute or relative path to the source file or directory.

destination.description: The absolute or relative path to the destination file or directory.

enabled.description: Whether this mapping is currently active.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this mapping does.

location.description: The working directory where the command should be executed.

command.description: The shell command or script to execute.
